demographics.living_situation: lives with family; an adult child is present and helped make contact

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My chest is heavy, I can't catch a deep breath, and I feel like I am drowning in a place that isn't mine.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It came on suddenly tonight and my chest feels tight and heavy — I keep trying to take a big breath and can't get it to go all the way in.

symptom_narrative.onset: came on this evening, over the last hour or so, after a big family gathering for a cultural holiday
symptom_narrative.duration: about an hour and still there
symptom_narrative.character: chest feels heavy and tight; keeps needing to sigh or gulp for a full breath; heart feels like it is racing
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: frightening — it feels like I can't get enough air
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: across the middle of my chest
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: started suddenly and has stayed since the gathering
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: letting out a big sigh helps for a moment
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: thinking about it and feeling upset makes it worse
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: feels tearful, on edge, and very homesick tonight
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: says the low, heavy feeling has been building for a long time but has never hit this hard or this physically before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: cannot settle or rest while the chest tightness and breathing are like this

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: Speaks about feeling rootless and not belonging anywhere, and about mourning the loss of the language and traditions she grew up with. Describes tension at home with family over cultural expectations and assimilation, and worry that her children and grandchildren are losing the culture. Says she watches a lot of news and programmes from her homeland to feel connected.

objective_data_offered.value: clutching the middle of her chest and taking big, deep sighing breaths; looks distressed and tearful
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: reported by the adult child, not a clinician assessment

objective_data_offered.value: says her heart feels like it is racing and she cannot take a full, deep breath
